chapters.title: Arrival
chapters.content: Emma arrived in Rome on a warm summer afternoon. She had a small suitcase, a city map, and a dream of exploring every corner of the ancient city.

chapters.title: Wrong Turn
chapters.content: While walking near the Colosseum, Emma took the wrong street and got lost. Every building looked beautiful, but none of them seemed familiar.

chapters.title: A Helpful Stranger
chapters.content: An old man noticed her confusion and smiled. In simple English, he helped her find her hotel and recommended the best gelato shop in the neighborhood.
